title: Manufacturing Engineer - Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises:
Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises!
